reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para tomarse un descanso. Lamentablemente las 2 veces que pasamos no había nada caliente para comer.
Ojalá mejoren eso.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to take a break. Unfortunately, both times we went there was nothing hot to eat.
Hopefully they'll improve that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16090706033176576823/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ1kyMEVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es pequeña pero cubre todos los servicios básicos cubiertos de manera satisfactoria ...  Baños limpios. Agua caliente para el mate y una plaza cerca para estirar las piernas

(Translated by Google)
It's small but covers all the basic services satisfactorily... Clean bathrooms, hot water for mate, and a nearby plaza to stretch your legs.

reviews.comment:

Pero..
Porque el gasoil esta mas caro que em otras ypf?
Esto no tendria que ser asi?

Good service... But... Why is diesel more expensive than at other YPF stations? Shouldn't it be like this?
